display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Channeled active ability that calls down a meteor after 2 seconds, dealing 130 magical damage and stunning all enemies in a 400 AoE for 0.75 seconds upon impact. Continues to burn for 6 seconds, dealing 50 magical damage per second to units and buildings while slowing non-building units by 20%. A potent area control and pushing tool. Stats: CD: 24s, Mana Cost: 75, Channel Time: 2s, Landing Delay: 0.5s, Burn Duration: 6s.

display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Provides substantial Intelligence and utility stats: +6 Strength, +6 Agility, +24 Intelligence, 10% Spell Amplification, and 40% Mana Regen Amplification. display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Team fight role focuses on area control and disruption. The channeled stun provides a significant setup for follow-up abilities, while the burning area damages and slows enemies, creating zones of control. Effective for initiating fights or securing chokepoints. Stats: Stun Duration: 0.75s, AoE Radius: 400, Slow: 20%.

display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Situational against heroes vulnerable to channeled setups or teams that clump together. Strong in sieging situations due to its building damage, but channeling time makes it risky versus interrupts. The magic damage over time and slow can counter heroes reliant on mobility. Stats: Building Impact Damage: 90, Building Burn DPS: 50.

display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Synergizes with heroes who have other disables to secure the channel time, or who need extra wave clear and pushing power. The Intelligence and mana regen amplification benefit heroes who spam spells, while the stun and zone control complement team fight initiators. Stats: Channel Time: 2s.

display_text: Meteor Hammer, Cost: 2850: Farming utility is significant through its ability to clear entire creep waves with one cast and deal damage to neutral camps.
